name: Pneumococcal Conjugate Vaccine (PCV13/PCV15/PCV20) Codes
description: CVX and CPT codes for pneumococcal conjugate vaccines including PCV13 (Prevnar 13), PCV15 (Vaxneuvance), and PCV20 (Prevnar 20). Used in childhood immunization status (CIS) measure. Requires 4 doses (at 2, 4, 6, and 12-15 months).
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Pneumococcal conjugate vaccine, 7 valent (PCV7, Prevnar — historical)
Pneumococcal conjugate vaccine, 13 valent (PCV13), for intramuscular use
Pneumococcal conjugate vaccine, 15 valent (PCV15), for intramuscular use
Pneumococcal conjugate vaccine, 20 valent (PCV20), for intramuscular use
